name: clerk-admin
title: Clerk Admin
description: Manage Clerk organizations and users directly from Raycast.
author: Amir Jakoby

commands.name: impersonate-user
commands.title: Impersonate User
commands.subtitle: Clerk Admin
commands.description: Generate a sign-in link for a user

commands.name: generate-jwt
commands.title: Generate JWT
commands.subtitle: Clerk Admin
commands.description: Generate a JWT token for a user

commands.name: switch-instance
commands.title: Switch Instance
commands.subtitle: Clerk Admin
commands.description: Switch between Clerk instances (prod, staging, dev)

preferences.name: clerkApiKey
preferences.title: Clerk API Key
preferences.description: Your Clerk secret key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...)

preferences.name: clerkFrontendApi
preferences.title: Clerk Frontend API
preferences.description: Frontend API URL (required for org-scoped JWTs and impersonation)
